scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => fs.existsSync(f) && fs.unlinkSync(f)); if (!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent || '')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: npx pnpm run typecheck && npx pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: npx pnpm --filter @workspace/db generate && npx pnpm run typecheck:libs && npx pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --if-present run typecheck
